name: Haverhill Community Choice (First Point Power) + National Grid delivery
utility: First Point Power (aggregation supply) · National Grid (delivery)

provenance.notes: City of Haverhill Community Choice Power Supply Program (municipal aggregation, M.G.L. c.164 s.134; consultant Colonial Power Group). Supply: $0.14377/kWh fixed all rate classes, term Nov-2023..Nov-2026 meter reads, per the program's official 2023.10 consumer notification; the 2025.08 change-in-law notice (colonialpowergroup.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Haverhill-2025.08-Public-Notice-CHANGE-IN-LAW.pdf) confirms 0.14377 was still in effect until it rose to 0.15101 with the AUGUST 2025 meter reads — so Jul 2025 = 0.14377. Delivery: identical FILED National Grid Jul-2025 R-1 components as ma-ngrid-r1-basic-2025 (M.D.P.U. 1-25-I): $10.00/mo + 20.257 c/kWh. Same encoding split: period rate 29.078 c/kWh = supply 14.377 + creditable delivery 14.701 (distribution 8.939 + transmission 5.798 - transition credit 0.036); riders 5.556 c/kWh = non-creditable riders (EE 2.879 + renewables 0.050 + NM surcharge 1.724 + SMART 0.729 + EV 0.174). All-in 34.634 c/kWh. Export encoded as net_metering (MA Class I); note supply-portion netting for competitive-supply customers is administratively handled by the supplier — simplified here to full net metering.
